title: Master v0.4.9 Feedback Queue UI Fix
notes:
Fixes Feedback Queue rendering error and improves feedback report/preview layout.

Changes:
- Adds missing escapeHtml helper to renderer.js.
- Feedback Queue can render report cards correctly.
- Report cards now include a short message preview.
- Preview shows the feedback JSON instead of the wrapper object.
- Improves Feedback Queue layout with clearer side-by-side reports/preview columns.
- Keeps Mark Seen / Need More Info / Mark Fixed / Reject.
- Keeps feedback status folder movement.
- Keeps history entries and Discord webhook alert behavior.
